category_sources: Official ScummVM docs describe playing classic point-and-click adventure games, text adventures, and RPGs with ScummVM.
source_facts.description says it is a graphic adventure game interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the display name ScummVM.
docs_sources: Official ScummVM documentation site is a dedicated docs domain.
repo_sources: Verified official ScummVM GitHub organization lists scummvm/scummvm as the main repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe ScummVM as software for playing supported classic adventure games and RPGs.
source_facts.description identifies a graphic adventure game interpreter.
